programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: Action movie. After years of neglect, a building-landmark will be demolished with dynamite. What a few people know is that inside it hides the cash a gang leader stole from his rivals. Will the interested parties reach the treasure in time?

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Two cop partners, who are also best friends attend a domestic disturbance, only for one to accidentaly critically wound the other. The rest of the police force are suspicious that there may have been no accident.

programme.title: The Good Girl
programme.desc: A discount store clerk strikes up an affair with a stock boy who considers himself the incarnation of Holden Caulfield.Justine is a sullen 30-year-old woman stuck in a dead-end job at the Retail Rodeo department store.In addition to her mind-numbing occupation, Justine also has to contend with her dim-witted husband, Phil, and his partner, Bubba, who work as house painters when they arent smoking pot and staring blankly at the television.Justine sees an opportunity for change, however, when she meets Holden, a fellow Retail Rodeo employee who is even more depressed than herself.The young Holden and Justine soon begin a passionate secret affair, unaware that it may not be so secret after all.

programme.title: Cleanskin
programme.desc: Harry (Sam Douglas), a British people arms dealer, is seen in bed with a prostitute named Rena (Shivani Ghai). While toying with Harrys pistol, she unloads it but replaces the empty magazine. Harrys bodyguard Ewan (Sean Bean) is a British Secret Intelligence Service. Harry and Ewan travel to a bank, transporting a briefcase of Semtex. The men are followed by two terrorists, Ash (Abhin Galeya) and Ibrahim (Mens-Sana Tamakloe). Ibrahim approaches Harry and Ewan from the top of a staircase, shooting at them. After Ash shoots Ewan twice, Harry tries to shoot Ash, only to discover there are no bullets in his gun. Ash kills Harry and takes the briefcase of Semtex. However, Ewan manages to shoot Ash in the arm; but, before he can apprehend him, Ash returns fire and escapes with the briefcase.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: John Cusack and Samuel L Jackson star in director Tod Williams horror, from screenplay adapted from his own novel by Stephen King. Its a normal day at Boston International Airport, with travellers on their way to and from their destinations, and airport, airline and security staff going about their business, and most of them using their mobile phones. Among them is Clay Riddell (Cusack), whos talking to his estranged wife and their young son, until his battery dies and he switches to a payphone. The inconvenience saves his life: just as his cash runs out, everyone using a mobile device around him receives an electronic pulse that causes agony and then turns them into uncontrollable ultraviolent killers. Clay narrowly escapes the mayhem and finds shelter in the paralysed subway system below the airport, where train driver Tom McCourt (Jackson) offers to lead the survivors to safety on foot. But the incident is a nationwide phenomenon, so getting out of the airport is just the start of their battle to stay alive.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: Abigail, a self-sufficient single mom meets Ben. They both think every great relationship ends in disaster. On the first date they come up with 10 things to do together before they break up. But the estimated end is not so sure - because fate adds #11 to their list.

programme.title: Baba
programme.desc: An weird but witty old woman is forced to deal with an ambiguous future after her country, family and the entire system of values are ruined. She is trying to solve her existential problems catching d trying to sell a rewarded war criminal as he was a rabbit in a wood. The only thing she did not know if he is really him.

programme.title: The Lucky Dragon
programme.desc: A young, Chinese dragon punished by the gods to be a mere mortal is cast down to earth. He is forced to make his way in a strange land until the evil forces discover his true identity. Take part in a world full of imagination while following the journey of a mischievous dragon who has been transformed by magic into a little boy and exiled from his home to live among humans. When both good and evil forces learn that a dragon has arrived, they look for him as he is the only one who can find the magical sword—whose owner can rule the universe! Will he find the sword in time before it gets into the wrong hands? Will he ever become a dragon again?

programme.title: House of the Stone Monkeys
programme.desc: The action proceeds along two tracks and two time frames. We meet the boy, who lives with his mother in a Budapest apartment house, in the summer of 2012. Another boy is spending his vacation with his grandparents in the same building in the summer of 1982. The house unveils its mysterious secret to both of them.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: In December 1941, Japan expands the occupation of its neighbouring countries to Southeast Asia. The railway from Tianjin to Nanjing in East China became a key military transportation route, heavily guarded by Japanese soldiers. Railroad worker Ma Yuan (Jackie Chan) leads a team of freedom fighters. Using his deep knowledge of the train network, he and his men sabotage it, ambushing Japanese soldiers and stealing supplies to feed the starving Chinese. Although the freedom fighters have no weapons of their own, they employ whatever tools are at hand, including a hammer and shovels, loose railway track planks and diverted trains. The local Chinese call the unlikely heroes the "Railroad Tigers". The freedom fighters find themselves on the wrong side of the tracks when the Japanese send reinforcements to Shandong. In an act of defiance, Ma Yuan launches his most dangerous mission yet, blowing up a heavily guarded railroad bridge. When the Japanese learn of the crippling plan, which will derail the war effort, the stakes are raised even higher. After many missed opportunities and missed shots, the bridge is blown up by the ragtag Chinese railroad tigers.

programme.title: Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: The Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding continues the story of 2003s fantasy romance The Prince and Me. In the earlier film, Paige (Julia Stiles) - a midwestern college co-ed - falls in love with Edvard (Luke Mably), sans realizing that he is actually the Prince of Denmark. In this sequel, Paige (now played by neophyte Kam Heskin) and Eddie must confront a centuries-old Danish edict declaring that if a Danish prince marries a commoner, he must abdicate his throne. C

programme.title: North and South: The Battle of New Market
programme.desc: Based on a true story of the American Civil War, culminating at the Battle of New Market, May 1864. A group of teenage cadets sheltered from war at the Virginia Military Institute must confront the horrors of an adult world when they are called upon to defend the Shenandoah Valley. Leaving behind their youth, these cadets must decide what they are fighting for.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: Donald P. Sinclair has placed six separate gold coins in different slot machines in his casino. The lucky six who find these coins discover an opportunity of a lifetime. The chance to own $2 million. Locked up in a locker in New Mexico, these six contestants must now race each other, to be the first to the cash. There are no rules in place and everything that could possibly happen, does. Whilst, behind the scenes, Sinclairs associates are placing their bets.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman
programme.desc: Rosie, a divorced mother, lives with her daughter in LA. But her life is not exactly ideal. The tv show she has been working on seems doomed. Her ex-husband just had a baby with a younger woman, while her daughter has started dating boys!

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: Max Richards, a teenage boy born with a medical condition of being lethally attractive, who is changed forever when he meets Alex, a girl with her own bizarre ailment, who aids him on his quest of self-discovery... without accidentally killing someone.

programme.title: Hangman
programme.desc: Mystery movie. American mystery, produced in 2017. Retired homicide detective Ray Archer and his partner, ex FBI agent Will Ruiney, are assigned to track down a vicious serial killer, who is playing a twisted version of the childrens game Hangman.

programme.title: The 51st State
programme.desc: In Ronny Yus fast-moving crime-thriller, Samuel L Jackson plays Elmo McElroy, a pharmaceutical genius who has made a fortune in illegal drugs, particularly with Formula 51, which is more potent than heroin and crack. But instead of selling it to his drug lord employer the Lizard (Meatloaf), he flies to Liverpool where Felix (Robert Carlyle) is acting as broker for gangster Leopold Durant (Ricky Tomlinson). Durant is prepared to offer $20m for the formula; money Elmo would love to spend, if he can stay alive long enough.

programme.title: Noble Things
programme.desc: Jimmy Wayne Collins finds himself adrift in Memphis, Tennessee. Forced to return home to the piney woods of Southeast Texas, Jimmy will face his imprisoned brother, his dying father and the demons he left behind.

programme.title: Slackers
programme.desc: Dave Goodman, Sam Schecter, and Jeff Davis are best friends who have spent almost four years at Holden University scamming their way through college. During one exam scam in their final semester Dave discovers Angela, and asks her out while writing his phone number on her exam sheet. Ethan Dulles (who calls himself "Cool Ethan"), a classmate obsessed with Angela to the extent of collecting loose hairs and making a hair doll and having surveillance photos and a shrine to Angela setup in his dorm room, takes her exam question sheet after Angela leaves and uses it to repeatedly confront and then blackmail the guys into setting up a successful date with Angela for him in exchange for his silence on the matter. The guys set Ethan up in multiple situations in an attempt to convince Angela to like him, while Dave tells Sam during their work researching her that Angela is no more important to him as any other scam theyve done. Ethan fails to attract her after frequent confrontations based on his delusional behavior, immaturity and ignorance of social norms. Though Ethan seems a lonely harmless nerd, he is scheming, psychotically obsessive and hopelessly socially incompetent.

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Young Jim Hawkins and Peg-legged Long John Silver set sail for adventure in Robert Louis Stevensons classic tale of dastardly pirates, swashbuckling heroes, buried treasure, and a young boys courage during the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Train Master
programme.desc: 62 year old Jeremiah Wilson is truly the Train Master of Willamette Western Railroad. He lives, breaths, and eats railroad. When Brett Banner, 32 year old heir to New York Eastern talks his dad into purchasing Willamette Western, there is immediately a clash between himself and Jeremiah. Jeremiah is fired by Brett two years from retirement and turns into a angry, depressed grandfather. When Bretts nine year old son Justin realizes Jeremiahs grandson Thomas can drive a locomotive, he kidnaps and holds Thomas favorite dinosaur ransom. Justin, Thomas and 3 other children board an old engine in for repairs and accidentally turns it into runaway engine causing a chain reaction of events.

programme.title: Uncle Nino
programme.desc: A distant, slightly dysfunctional family is brought closer together when the fathers long-estranged Uncle Nino comes from Italy to Chicago for a surprise visit.

programme.title: True Smile
programme.desc: Sergio, a 26-year-old autistic male is blind and has never seen a smile. He does, however, give everybody a sincere smile every day. A documentary based on the amazing story encapsulated by Sergio Aznarez Rosados life.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The story of Barry Minkow, a young charismatic business man who becomes a wealthy CEO by lying, cheating and stealing his way to the top.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: A space cruiser crash lands on the purple planet of Heinous, an intergalactic prison that is home to the most vile and dangerous villains in the galaxy. All of the crew have perished except for its pilot; intergalactic space hero Max Cloud, the ships hapless chef Jake, and its reluctant Commander, Rexy. Their mission is simple, wait inside their vessel until help arrives and try their best to keep the prisoners outside from getting in, however this is Max Cloud and he doesnt do simple. ...But this is not real life. This is a video-game, and at the helm of the adventure is Sarah, a teenage video game fanatic who immerses herself in fantasy to avoid dealing with her less than packed social life and a strained relationship with her dad, straight laced single parent Tony. After a fallout, Tony bans Sarah from playing games and in a frenzy of teenage emotion Sarah makes a wish, that in the blink of an eye becomes a reality... With a flash of pixelated light Sarah is transported into the video game by the mysterious Space Witch, who exists in an etherial void, behind a secret door, that never appears in the same place twice! So Sarah finds herself trapped inside the game and the only person who can help her is her equally socially defunct but incredibly charming friend, Cowboy, who must control Sarah from her bedroom in Brooklyn and keep her from losing her one life, in a game that cant be paused, that they have never finished before! To make matters worse Sarah has not found herself inside the body of the wonderful Max Cloud, but Jake, thats right... the hapless chef. We follow Sarah as she negotiates the terrifying and dangerous planet of Heinous alongside the ever confident Max and fed up Rexy, jumping back and forth with the real world as the pressure mounts on Cowboy and the real stakes start to rise. They soon encounter stranded Bounty Hunter, Brock Donnelly, and realise they must get off the planet before help arrives as the planets surface burns so hot every day that anything not underground is space liquid! AND to add to the stakes Cowboy must keep his best friend away from the evil clutches of the games villain Revengor, a part man, part machine, lunatic who is hell bent on taking Max Clouds ship and with an army of prisoners and an evil sorcersss called SHEE, his chances look pretty damn good. The action bounces between the video game and the real world as Cowboy and Sarah must come together to get her home, all leading to the ultimate showdown in Revengors lair, where back in Brooklyn, video game expertise arrives in the form of a very unlikely hero. Sit down. Plug in. Its time to play THE INTERGALACTIC ADVENTURES OF MAX CLOUD.

programme.title: Cookies Fortune
programme.desc: Cookies Fortune unfolds over an eventful Easter weekend in the small town of Holly Springs, Mississippi. The town residents are peaceful, kind folk--with the exception of Camille Dixon (Glenn Close) - a pushy theatre director with an incredibly shy younger sister, Cora (Julianne Moore), whose estranged daughter Emma (Liv Tyler) has just returned to town. On the heels of her latest play, Camille is shocked to discover that her Aunt Jewel Mae "Cookie" Orcutt (Patricia Neal) has committed suicide. Terrified at the thought of how this will tarnish the family name, she eats the suicide note to make it look like a burglary. This set-up leads the police to one main suspect, Willis Richland (Charles S. Dutton), who also happens to be Cookies best friend. Although the rest of the town is convinced Willis didnt commit the crime, an outside investigator (Courtney B. Vance) isnt so sure. As Easter Sunday and opening night of the play arrive, the truth comes out, revealing more secrets than anyone could have possibly imagined.

programme.title: Spooner
programme.desc: Facing eviction from his parents home on his 30th birthday, a socially awkward guy meets the girl of his dreams and creates his own rules for growing up.

programme.title: Modigliani
programme.desc: American drama, produced in 2004. An American, French, German, Italian, Rumanian, and British co-production. The story of Amedeo Modiglianis bitter rivalry with Pablo Picasso, and his tragic romance with Jeanne Hebuterne.

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: Moe Diamond, a money launderer struggling with memory loss sustained in a car crash, goes on the run, evading the police while carrying heaps of stolen cash he knows nothing about. Moe and his partner in crime Bobby "Skunk" Cohen had been given a job by Bobbys uncle Perico, wherein he gave them a sum of $20 million to launder. However, the two are ambushed while doing a side job by corrupt police officers. The two manage to escape the cops, but soon after end up in a car accident.

programme.title: Land Of the Blind
programme.desc: A soldier recounts his relationship with a famous political prisoner attempting to overthrow their countrys authoritarian government.

programme.title: The Defender
programme.desc: Today - the global war on terror rages on. The United States will not give an inch against terrorists, especially Mohamed Jamar, considered to be the worst of them all. Jamar has been missing for months, but his network continues its function. The President stands firm before the world, but behind the scenes his teams are working to find the final solution. Jamar represents a paradox: he can never be killed, because if found dead he would become an instant martyr. If caught he must be tried. If he is found guilty he would become a martyr and further inspiration to acts of terror. If acquitted, the policies of the entire western world would be destroyed. So he must remain invisible. Roberta Jones, the head of the National Security Agency, is working to ensure he remains invisible, forever. Under the guise of attending an Eastern European conference on Terror in Romania, she attends a secret meeting with Jamar at a secluded hotel outside Bucharest. No one knows about this meeting and her goal is to buy his invisibility. Her only companions are her security team of six headed by her personal bodyguard, Lance Rockford. They are the best of the best, former military special forces personnel capable of anything. When they arrive at the hotel for the secret meeting they are ambushed no one is supposed to know about the meeting, but someone wants it stopped. They have to fight for their lives against an unknown attacker. Lance, a man of highest integrity with an impressive record of service for his country, is forced into a situation which challenges his very beliefs...

programme.title: Aviators
programme.desc: Amerikāņu multimiljonāra un avantūrista Hovarda Hjūza galvu reibinošs dzīvesstāsts Pēc tēva nāves Hovardam tiek lielākā daļa no kompānijas "Hughes Tool Co" akcijām. Slavenā naftas urbumu mašīnas izgudrotāja dēls pārvērš nelielu fabriku par fantastisku, gigantisku, dzīvības pārpildītu ienesīgu uzņēmumu. Nauda dedzina Hjūza sirdi, tā nedod viņam miera, bet dvēsele alkst pēc kā lielāka.

programme.title: Pilns bruņojums
programme.desc: Pragmatisks ASV jūras kājnieks savām acīm redz Vjetnamas kara dehumanizējošo ietekmi uz saviem kolēģiem - sākot no brutālajām apmācības nometnēm līdz asiņainajām ielu kaujām Huē.

programme.title: Melnais gulbis
programme.desc: Ņujorkas baleta trupas balerīnas Ninas dzīve ir deja. Viņa dzīvo kopā ar māti Ēriku, kas ir izbijusi balerīna un aizgūtnēm atbalsta meitas profesionālās ambīcijas. Kad mākslinieciskais režisors izlemj nomainīt prīmu izrādē "Gulbju ezers", viņa izvēle ir tieši Nina. Tomēr viņai uzrodas konkurente - jaunā dejotāja Lilī, kuras sniegums arī aizrauj režisoru. Izrādei ir vajadzīga dejotāja, kas spēj nodejot gan Balto gulbi ar nevainību un grāciju, kā arī Melno gulbi, kas iemieso viltu un jutekliskumu. Nina pilnībā atbilst Baltā tēlam, bet Lilī ir Melnā gulbja iemiesojums. Kad jaunās dejotājas uzsāk sāncensību par šo lomu, viņu draudzība kļūst arvien sarežģītāka un Nina arvien vairāk saskaras ar draudzenes rakstura tumšo pusi un abas ir gatavas viena otru iznīcināt.

programme.title: Ķeceris
programme.desc: Divas jaunas misionāru meitenes klauvē pie kādas mājas durvīm. Tās atver omulīgais misters Rīds, kurš viņas aicina iekšā. Ātri vien meitenes apjēdz, ka nokļuvušas velnišķīgā slazdā un šī ir spēle uz dzīvību un nāvi.

programme.title: Pa asmeni skrejošais
programme.desc: Losandželosa, 2019. gads. Riks Dekards ir "pa asmens smaili skrejošais" - policists un atlīdzību mednieks, kura uzdevums ir atrast četrus androīdus-replikantus, kuri nelegāli atgriezās uz Zemes un meklē savu radītāju.

programme.title: Viesnīca "Diženā Budapešta"
programme.desc: Viesnīca "Diženā Budapešta" stāsta par Eiropā slavenās viesnīcas leģendārā viesmīļa Gustava H un portjē Zero Mustafa piedzīvojumiem. Viesnīcas darbinieki kļūst par lieciniekiem nenovērtējamas renesanses gleznas zādzībai, kādas bagātas ģimenes cīņai par milzīgu mantojumu un dramatiskām izmaiņām, kuras notiek Eiropā periodā starp diviem pasaules kariem.

programme.title: Satiksme
programme.desc: Prezidents ieceļ konservatīvu tiesnesi vadīt Amerikas pieaugošo karu pret narkotikām, taču viņš atklāj, ka viņa pusaugu meita ir atkarīga no kokaīna. Divi narkotiku apkarošanas aģenti aizsargā ziņotāju. Bet cietumā esoša narkotiku barona sieva mēģina turpināt ģimenes biznesu.

programme.title: Guči nams
programme.desc: Filmas pamatā ir patiess stāsts par itāļu modes impēriju radījušo Guči dinastiju. Patrīcija Redžani ieprecas Guči ģimenē. Viņas nevaldāmā godkāre sāk graut dzimtas mantojumu, kā arī izraisa nodevības, pagrimuma un pat slepkavību virpuli. Filmas scenārijs veidots, balstoties uz 2001. gadā izdoto grāmatu "Guči nams: sensacionāls stāsts par slepkavību, ārprātu, greznību un alkatību". Galvenajās omās: Lady Gaga, Adams Draivers, Džeremijs Aironss, Als Pačino

programme.title: Viesnīca "Diženā Budapešta"

programme.title: Stiprāks
programme.desc: Vienkāršais strādnieku puisis Džefs 2013. gada Bostonas maratona sprādziena laikā tiek smagi ievainots. Slimnīcā viņam tiek amputētas abas kājas, bet nelaimes brīdī Džefs ir izšķīries ar draudzeni Erīnu. Pēc traģiskā notikuma Erīna viņam ir blakus katru dienu, un tieši tas kļūst par pamatu Džefa vēlmei dzīvot un cīņai ar alkohola atkarību. Drāmas "Stiprāks" scenārijs ir balstīts uz patiesiem notikumiem. Džefa stāsts aizkustināja miljoniem cilvēku visā pasaulē, savukārt žurnālisti viņu padarīja teju par rokzvaigzni. Tā kā jaunā vīrieša ikdiena no traģēdijas brīža tika regulāri atspoguļota visdažādākajos medijos, viņš kļuva par iedvesmas avotu tiem cilvēkiem, kuri meklēja spēku, kā pārvarēt gan fiziskas, gan emocionālas sāpes. Šī filma tiek uzskatīta par vienu no galvenās lomas atveidotāja Džeika Džilenhola labākajiem darbiem. Aktieris vēsta, ka vairākkārt ticies ar īsto Džefu Baumani, un abi ļoti satuvinājušies.

programme.title: Mātes instinkts
programme.desc: Alise un Selīna ir kaimiņienes skaistā un rāmā 60-to gadu ASV priekšpilsētā. Viņām ir viss - skaistas mājas, mīloši un abi pelnoši vīri, un pat dēli vienādā vecumā. Taču traģisks negadījums to visu izjauc - idille pārtop šausmās, savstarpējās aizdomās un paranojā.

programme.title: Mātes instinkts
programme.desc: Alise un Selīna ir kaimiņienes skaistā un rāmā 60-to gadu ASV priekšpilsētā. Viņām ir viss - skaistas mājas, mīloši un abi pelnoši vīri, un pat dēli vienādā vecumā. Taču traģisks negadījums to visu izjauc - idille pārtop šausmās, savstarpējās aizdomās un paranojā.

programme.title: Melnā kaste
programme.desc: Kas notika reisā Dubaija–Parīze, pirms lidmašīna nokrita Alpos? Katastrofas galvenajam izmeklētājam Matjē Vasēram šī ir pirmā nopietnā civilās aviācijas negadījuma izmeklēšana. Vai notikušais ir pilota kļūda, tehniska kļūme vai tomēr terorakts? Rūpīgi izanalizējot melnās kastes saturu, Matjē aptver, ka izmeklēšana jāveic slepenībā. Taču viņš pat nenojauš, cik tālu patiesības meklējumi viņu aizvedīs.

programme.title: Labie meli
programme.desc: Pēc tam, kad ienaidnieki iznīcina kādu ciematu Sudānā, bārenis Teo, viņa brāļi, māsas un vietējie ciematiņa iedzīvotāji pārceļas uz bēgļu nometni Kenijā. Pagājuši trīspadsmit gadi kopš šausminošā notikušā, un dzīve viņiem piespēlē nebijušu iespēju - pārcelties uz dzīvi ASV. Kanzasā viņus sagaida nodarbinātības aģentūras darbiniece Kerija Deivisa. Tikšanās ar šo dāmu izmainīs bēgļu dzīves uz visiem laikiem un liks viņu acīs iemirdzēties cerībai par labāku nākotni. Galvenajā lomā Rīza Viterspūna.

programme.title: Lepnums un aizspriedumi
programme.desc: Keira Naitlija, Metjū Makfeidens un Donalds Sazerlends pasaulslavenajā Džeinas Ostinas romāna "Lepnums un aizspriedumi" ekranizējumā! Anglija, 18.gadsimta beigas. Piecas māsas Benetas - Elizabete, Džeina, Lidija, Mērija un Kitija aug mātes stingrā uzraudzībā, kura par savu galveno uzdevumu uzskata atrast meitām preciniekus un nodrošināt viņu nākotni. Tomēr enerģiskā un inteliģentā Elizabete tiecas dzīvē sasniegt ko vairāk un savos centienos jūt arī tēva atbalstu. Kad netālajā kaimiņu rezidencē ierodas bagātais vecpuisis Binglija kungs, Benetu mājās sākas rosība. Pavisam drīz Elizabete nejauši sastop pievilcīgo un, kā drīz atklājas, arī snobisko Dārsija kungu.

programme.title: Melnā kaste
programme.desc: Kas notika reisā Dubaija–Parīze, pirms lidmašīna nokrita Alpos? Katastrofas galvenajam izmeklētājam Matjē Vasēram šī ir pirmā nopietnā civilās aviācijas negadījuma izmeklēšana. programme.title: Lepnums un aizspriedumi
programme.desc: Keira Naitlija, Metjū Makfeidens un Donalds Sazerlends pasaulslavenajā Džeinas Ostinas romāna "Lepnums un aizspriedumi" ekranizējumā! Anglija, 18.gadsimta beigas. Piecas māsas Benetas - Elizabete, Džeina, Lidija, Mērija un Kitija aug mātes stingrā uzraudzībā, kura par savu galveno uzdevumu uzskata atrast meitām preciniekus un nodrošināt viņu nākotni. Tomēr enerģiskā un inteliģentā Elizabete tiecas dzīvē sasniegt ko vairāk un savos centienos jūt arī tēva atbalstu. Kad netālajā kaimiņu rezidencē ierodas bagātais vecpuisis Binglija kungs, Benetu mājās sākas rosība. Pavisam drīz Elizabete nejauši sastop pievilcīgo un, kā drīz atklājas, arī snobisko Dārsija kungu.

programme.title: Labie meli
programme.desc: Pēc tam, kad ienaidnieki iznīcina kādu ciematu Sudānā, bārenis Teo, viņa brāļi, māsas un vietējie ciematiņa iedzīvotāji pārceļas uz bēgļu nometni Kenijā. Pagājuši trīspadsmit gadi kopš šausminošā notikušā, un dzīve viņiem piespēlē nebijušu iespēju - pārcelties uz dzīvi ASV. Kanzasā viņus sagaida nodarbinātības aģentūras darbiniece Kerija Deivisa. Tikšanās ar šo dāmu izmainīs bēgļu dzīves uz visiem laikiem un liks viņu acīs iemirdzēties cerībai par labāku nākotni. Galvenajā lomā Rīza Viterspūna.

programme.title: Brīnums
programme.desc: Desmitgadīgais Augusts Pulmens, kurš piedzima ar nopietnu sejas defektu un slimības dēļ līdz šim ir mācījies mājās, pirmoreiz dosies uz skolu, lai uzsāktu mācības vietējās skolas 5. klasē. Augija vienaudžiem nebūs viegli pieņemt citādo un aiz neparastās ārienes ieraudzīt to stipro, drosmīgo un labsirdīgo zēnu, ko pazīst viņa mīlošā ģimene. Lai gan Augijs pūlēsies būt tāds pats kā citi skolēni, viņš tikai vēlreiz apliecinās, ka ir īpašs, un ne jau neparastā izskata dēļ.

programme.title: Vai spēsi man kādreiz piedot?
programme.desc: Lī Israela pagājušā gadsimta 70. un 80. gados karjeru veidoja, profilējot slavenības, piemēram, Ketrinu Hepbērnu, Estē Lauderu vai žurnālisti Dorotiju Kilgalenu. Kad viņa to vairs nespēja, jo bija zaudējusi ķērienu mainīgās gaumes dēļ, viņa, lojālā drauga Džeka mudināta, pievēršas maldināšanai.

programme.title: Oskari
programme.desc: Kopsavilkums par 98. gadskārtējo Kinoakadēmijas balvu pasniegšanas ceremoniju Holivudā.

programme.title: Brīnums
programme.desc: Desmitgadīgais Augusts Pulmens, kurš piedzima ar nopietnu sejas defektu un slimības dēļ līdz šim ir mācījies mājās, pirmoreiz dosies uz skolu, lai uzsāktu mācības vietējās skolas 5. klasē. programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Baking Championship: Next Gen
programme.desc: The young bakers work together to create two cakes that fit together like a puzzle and decorate each puzzle cake piece to represent their sibling.

programme.title: Bakers Dozen
programme.desc: The competitors flaunt their artistic flair with works of candy art. The three finalists construct macaron towers for guest judge Leanne Pietrasinski.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chefs knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Irvine is ready for any challenge he is challenged to overcome culinary obstacles and deliver a delicious meal before his time runs out. With new challenges from this exciting, fun-loving chef, viewers will see if Robert can make dinner, possible!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Bakers Dozen

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Chef Jet Tila curates a group of Thai chefs ready to blow Chef Alex Guarnaschelli out of the water with their skills in Thai cuisine. Previous Alex vs America winner Sugar Sungkamee and James Beard Nominee Arnold Myint join Chef Jet with a plan to take Alex down in the first round. In unfamiliar food territory, will Iron Chef Guarnaschelli be able to hold her own, or will she be forced to put down her knives in the first round? Host Eric Adjepong welcomes Thai experts Justin Pichetrungsi and Penny Chutima to judge in two rounds of spicy and intense cooking.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Eric Adjepong hosts as experienced bakers and successful competitors Keya Wingfield, Melissa Yanc and Karina Rivera join forces to take down Chef Alex Guarnaschelli in a pastry battle. As the cuisines get even more difficult, Alex must use her expertise in gameplay to outthink and outcook her opponents. Stephanie Boswell and Sherry Yard judge the two rounds of competition, where the chefs have a chance to win up to $15,000, but only if they can defeat Chef Alex!

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Bake It til You Make It
programme.desc: Food Network ditches the studio to follow seven gifted amateur bakers. Theyre hitting the road to submit their best desserts in baking competitions across America, all while pursuing the sweetest taste in the world: victory.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as theyre pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and wholl be the first to crumble?

The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Chopped

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Bake It til You Make It
programme.desc: Food Network ditches the studio to follow seven gifted amateur bakers. Theyre hitting the road to submit their best desserts in baking competitions across America, all while pursuing the sweetest taste in the world: victory.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Every region has its own local culture and flavor. One of the best ways for a traveler to immerse him or herself in new destinations is to taste these unique dishes. This taste exploration allows even the strictest of dieters the freedom to indulge. In the new series, Travel Channels Man v. Food, host Adam Richman sets out to travel the country in search of the best places to do some serious indulging. Starting season 5, Casey Webb took over as host.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Outchefd
programme.desc: Quack Attack. Home cook Sean Johnson is flying high when Eddie Jackson surprises him with a duel of duck against Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Outchefd
programme.desc: Seafood Smackdown. Its a coastal competition when Eddie Jackson stuns home cook Chelsea Gieselmann with a seafood showdown against Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez heads out of her home kitchen and into the kitchens of some of LAs hottest restaurants, with chefs teaching and testing Gomez to see how quickly she can learn the ropes with the ultimate goal of creating a dish good enough to make each restaurants menu.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez and Raquelle meet up with Chef Marcel Vigneron at his Hollywood hotspot, Lemon Grove. Marcel greets Selena with three of his favorite dishes that set the bar for how good her dish will need to be to make the menu! While Raquelle discovers the delights of the professional walk-in refrigerator, Selena creates a colorful dish using some very unusual ingredients. The ultimate decision is down to Marcel and his team on whether her purple plate will be their new special or just a color bomb.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Infused with her warmth and passion for all things family, Joanna Gaines spends time in the kitchen sharing her favorite recipes, where they come from and why she finds herself returning to them time and time again.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Infused with her warmth and passion for all things family, Joanna Gaines spends time in the kitchen sharing her favorite recipes, where they come from and why she finds herself returning to them time and time again.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay V. Symon
programme.desc: Join our hosts, renowned celebrity chefs and restaurateurs Bobby Flay and Michael Symon, as they test the skills of eight expert barbecue connoisseurs. Filmed at the Star Hill Ranch in Austin, Texas, the eight chefs are divided into two teams but, in order to claim first pick for their team, Bobby and Michael go head-to-head in a backyard BBQ challenge. Each episode sees one of the chefs being eliminated from the show until there is only one left, the winner who is awarded the title of Master of Cue. The weekly contests aim to reveal the chefs talents and expose their weaknesses and include tasks such as cooking up a tomahawk rib-eye and taking on a Texas beef challenge.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chefs knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: Face of War
programme.desc: Viewers follow compelling stories from war-affected areas, revealing the human cost of conflict and the resilience of those enduring it. The program provides a deeper understanding of how conflict shapes lives, emphasizing courage, survival, and the human spirit in the face of adversity.

The program combines entertainment with useful insights, helping audiences discover innovative ways to enhance comfort, style, and functionality at home.

programme.title: Bīstamās līgavas māsas
programme.desc: Kad naudaskāri bandīti grib sagrābt greznu kāzu viesus par ķīlniekiem, viņi vēl nezina, ka līgavas māsa ir slepenā aģente, kura ir gatava uz visu, ja kāds mēģinās izjaukt viņas labākās draudzenes kāzas.

programme.title: Kapteinis Fantastika
programme.desc: Viņi prot vairākas valodas un ir izglītoti dažādās zinātnēs. Viņi prot medīt un rīkoties ar ieročiem. Viņi dzīvo mežā un atrodas pilnīgā harmonijā ar dabu. Un tikai apstākļu sakritība liek viņiem pamest savu paradīzi un doties uz lielo pilsētu. Kas notiks tad, kad viņi sastapsies ar civilizāciju un nāksies izbaudīt visus modernās dzīves plusus un mīnusus?

programme.title: Bostonas slepkava
programme.desc: 60. gados Bostonu pārbiedē virkne nežēlīgu slepkavību, kuru upuri ir sievietes. Spītējot tā laika uzskatam par sieviešu lomu sabiedrībā un viedokli, ka daiļā dzimuma pārstāvēm jāraksta par modi un izklaidi, nevis jāšķetina nopietni noziegumi, Loreta un viņas kolēģe Džīna Koula atklāj, ka Bostonā notikušās sieviešu nožņaugšanas ir savstarpēji saistītas un tās paveicis sērijveida slepkava. Loreta slepkavu nodēvē par "Bostonas žņaudzēju", četru rakstu sērijā atklājot satraucošas likumsakarības un iestāžu kļūdas, kas ļāva slepkavam nekontrolēti darboties.

programme.title: Pusotrs spiegs
programme.desc: Kelvins Džoiners (Kevins Hārts) skolas laikā bija populārais puisis. Divdesmit gadus vēlāk viņš ir veiksmīgs grāmatvedis, kuru pārsteidz ziņa no Boba Stouna. Izrādās, ka patiesībā viņš ir Robijs Vīrdikts (Dveins Džonsons) – apsmietais tīnis viņa skolā. Bobs ir trenējies divdesmit gadus un šobrīd ir izcils CIP aģents. Viņš algo Kelvinu, lai ar viņa grāmatvedības prasmju palīdzību izsekotu ierīci, kura ASV spiegošanas jomā var radīt jucekli. Dīvainais pāris sastopas ar pārspēku, taču viņiem sanāk arī daži varoņdarbi.

programme.title: Mīluļu slepenā dzīve
programme.desc: Makss (Luiss Sīkejs) ir enerģisks un sajūsmināts Džeka Rasela terjers, kurš dzīvo Manhetenas dzīvoklī kopā ar īpašnieci Keitiju (Elija Kempere). Taču viņa laimīgā dzīve pārtrūkst, kad saimniece pieņem jaunu suni Grāfu (Ēriks Stounstrīts). Makss apņemas atgūt saimnieces uzmanību tikai sev un mēģina Grāfu atstāt kādā sānielā, taču viņus ielenc kaķu banda, kuru vada Ozons (Stīvs Kūgans). Viņi tik tikko izglābj savas dzīvības, kad nākas saskarties ar pamesto dzīvnieku armijas niknumu apburošā, bet psihiski nelīdzsvarotā truša Sniegapikas (Kevins Hārts) vadībā. Šis ir Ņujorkas piedzīvojums, kurš liek Maksam un Grāfam izvērtēt savu sacensību un mēģināt izjaukt Sniegapikas atriebes plānu pret visiem dzīvnieku īpašniekiem Ņujorkā.

programme.title: Transformeri: Nezvēru laikmets
programme.desc: Spraigi piedzīvojumi un elpu aizraujošs specefektu vēriens ir aizrāvis "Transformers" filmu fanus visā pasaulē jau kopš pirmās filmas iznākšanas uz kinoekrāniem! Jaunākā filma "Transformeri: Nezvēru laikmets" aizvedīs skatītājus aizraujošā kino piedzīvojumā apkārt pasaulei 90. gados un iepazīstinās ar pilnīgi jauniem transformeriem – The Maximals. Cīņa starp Autobotiem un Maldikoniem norisināsies jaunā līmenī!

programme.title: Karalisks piedāvājums
programme.desc: 2010. gadā pirms Arābu pavasara izmisušam amerikāņu tirgonim Alanam (Toms Henks) pēc mājas zaudēšanas un šķiršanās no sievas dzīvē ir iestājusies krīze. Izmisīgi cenšoties atgūt atpakaļ savu sievu, viņš dodas uz Saūda Arābiju, lai valdībai pārdotu hologrāfisku telekonferences sistēmu. Cieši apņēmies noslēgt līgumu un nepalikt uz sēkļa brūkošā ekonomikā, viņš mācās, kā izturēties svešā kultūrā ar taksometra vadītāja (Aleksandrs Bleks) un vietējā ārsta palīdzību (Sarita Čodrija)

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Ziemassvētku brīvdienās dodoties uz Parīzi, Makkalisteru ģimene nejauši aizmirst mājās savu astoņgadīgo dēlu Kevinu. Tiesa, tas zēnam neliedz sarīkot pašam savas Ziemassvētku svinības. Beidzot viņu neviens vairs nekomandē, neierobežo un nepieskata! Viss būtu ideāli, ja vien rūdītie kramplauži Harijs un Mārvs nebūtu ieplānojuši apzagt visas tuvākās apkaimes mājas pašā svētku vakarā.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Iepriekšējos Ziemassvētkos, dodoties brīvdienās uz Franciju, Makkalisteri aizmirsa mājās savu jaunāko atvasi Kevinu. Šogad, dodoties uz Floridu, viņi dēlu pazaudē lidostā. Kamēr ģimene lido uz Maiami, Kevins ar tēva kredītkartēm kabatā ir ceļā uz Ņujorku. Lielajā pilsētā viņš atrod jaunus draugus, iekārtojas lepnākajā viesnīcā un sastop arī savus vecos paziņas – divus aprobežotos kramplaužus. Šoreiz abi ļaundari Ziemassvētku vakarā plāno apzagt lielāko rotaļlietu veikalu Ņujorkā. Turklāt viņi jau sen alkst atriebties Kevinam – zēnam, kura dēļ nonāca cietumā.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: ASV Valsts Aizsardzības dienestam ir nozagta slepena mikroshēma. Noziedznieki cer to pārdot un nopelnīt miljoniem dolāru, taču vērtīgā prece nejauši ir nokļuvusi rotaļlietu mašīnā, kas patlaban atrodas kādā mājīgā Čikāgas savrupnamā. Noziedznieki dodas mikroshēmu atgūt. Ceļā viņiem stājas bīstams pretinieks Alekss – astoņgadīgs puišelis, kuram netrūkst izdomas un kurš ir viens pats mājās.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Ir pagājis labs laiks kopš Ziemassvētkiem, kad Makkalisteru ģimene, dodoties brīvdienās, pirmo reizi aizmirsa mājās Kevinu. Šos Ziemassvētkus Kevins nolēmis pavadīt sava tēta bagātās draudzenes Natālijas milzīgajā savrupmājā. Taču mierīgais vakars viņam kārtējo reizi izvēršas par īstu piedzīvojumu, jo Natālijas māju svētkos nolēmuši apciemot zagļi. Starp citu - vienam no viņiem ar Kevinu ir kārtojami veci rēķini!

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Baksteru ģimene pārceļas uz dzīvi citā štatā, taču 10 gadus veco Finnu biedē jaunā māja, jo viņš uzskata, ka tajā spokojas. Kamēr puisēns izliek slazdus, lai notvertu "spoku", viņa vecāki aizkavējas citā pilsētas malā, un viņš paliek mājās kopā ar māsu. Tikmēr trīs zagļi vēlas iegūt ārkārtīgi dārgu gleznu, kuru bijušais īpašnieks paslēpis slepenā telpā. Vai viņiem izdosies iegūt kāroto un uzvarēt kaujā mazo gudrinieku?

programme.title: Mis Moksi
programme.desc: Mis Moksi, pieradināta kaķenīte, brīvdienu laikā apmaldās, un viņai nākas atrast ceļu atpakaļ uz mājām, ceļojot cauri Dienvideiropai kopā ar, kaķa skatījumā, visnepatīkamākajām radībām, kādas vien iespējamas, – komisku suni un vecu, gudru putnu. Šī ceļojuma laikā viņa paplašina savu skatījumu uz dzīvi un atklāj patieso draudzības nozīmi.

programme.title: Kaķu mīlis
programme.desc: Koledžas studente Margo piestrādā nelielā kinoteātrī, kur iepazīstas ar biežu tā apmeklētāju, par sevi vecāko Robertu. Pāri letei aizsāktais flirts pārtop nepārtrauktā čatošanā. Kad abi nonāk līdz randiņam, Margo atklāj, ka dzīvē satiktais Roberts itin nemaz neatbilst tam Robertam, ar kuru viņa flirtējusi īsziņās. Skarbs vēstījums par dzimumu dalījumu, ķepurošanos cauri modernās randiņošanas staignājam un to, kādas bīstamas īpašības mēs mēdzam piedēvēt cilvēkiem otrpus mūsu telefoniem.

programme.title: Grāfs Monte-Kristo
programme.desc: Izbēdzis no cietuma uz salas, kurā, nepatiesi apsūdzēts par valsts nodevību, pavadījis četrpadsmit gadus, Edmunds Dantess atgriežas kā grāfs Monte-Kristo, lai atriebtos vīriem, kas viņu nodevuši.

programme.title: Mirušie nesāpina
programme.desc: Divi pionieri Amerikas pilsoņu kara laikā frontē cīnās par savu dzīvību un mīlestību.

programme.title: Lielās sacīkstes cauri Eiropai
programme.desc: Eda, jauna pele ar lieliem sapņiem, izmanto iespēju piedalīties sacīkstēs "Grand Prix", pārģērbusies par savu varoni Edu. Viņa stājas pretī sāncenses sabotāžai un pierāda, ka pat vismazākais braucējs var atstāt vislielāko iespaidu.

programme.title: Meitene, vārdā Vilo
programme.desc: Vilo manto mežu, māju un burvju spējas no savas vecmāmiņas Alvinas. Viņai jāatrod vēl trīs meitenes ar maģiskām dāvanām, lai izglābtu mežu. Par laimi, viņai līdzās ir lapsa Rufuss.

programme.title: Dzīves grāmata
programme.desc: Meksikas pilsētā Sanandželā Manolo, Marija un Džoakvins laiku pavadījuši kopā jau kopš bērnības. Lai arī viņu dzīves ir bijušas atšķirīgas - Marija tika nosūtīta uz Eiropu, Džoakvins pievienojās armijai, bet Manolo studēja un kļuva par cīkstoni - viena lieta nemainījās. Manolo un Džoakvins abi vēlas apprecēt Mariju.

programme.title: Maja Ma
programme.desc: Pallavi Patela ir indiešu vidusmēra ģimenes sieva, pazīstama ar savu dejotprasmi un kulinārijas mākslu. Dēla Teja saderināšanās vakars draud izgāzties, jo paklīdušas tenkas par priekšzīmīgo mājsaimnieci Pallavi.

programme.title: Ferdinands
programme.desc: Ferdinands ir pats labsirdīgākais bullis visā Spānijā. Neskatoties uz iespaidīgajiem izmēriem un milzu spēku, viņš jau kopš bērnības neizrādīja sevišķu interesi par badīšanos ar saviem sugas brāļiem. Nejaušības dēļ Ferdinands nokļūst to vidū, kuri tiek izvēlēti, lai piedalītos buļļu cīņās Madridē. Tagad Ferdinandam nāksies aizstāvēt savus miermīlīgos dzīves uzskatus un atgādināt pārējiem, ka grūtību priekšā galvenais ir palikt, kāds tu esi. Jo tikai tā tu spēsi izmainīt pasauli sev apkārt.

programme.title: Mīlestība dejas ritmā
programme.desc: Talantīgā balerīna Bārlova nolēmusi īstenot savu sapni Amerikas mākslas svētnīcā Ņujorkā. Diemžēl iepazīšanās ar svētnīcas realitāti nav īpaši patīkama – pieredzējusī baleta pasniedzēja Oksana skaidri un gaiši pasaka: Bārlova vēl nav ne tuvu pilnībai. Norijusi krupi, meitene nepadodas un piedalās jaunas Brodvejas deju izrādes atlasē. Režisors Zanders pievērš uzmanību Bārlovai un izvēlas viņu mēģinājumiem. Pēc dažām dienām topošās izrādes kodolam pievienojas talantīgais pianists Čārlijs. Tāpat kā Bārlova, viņš ieradies Ņujorkā, lai īstenotu sapni. Puisim un meitenei rodas simpātijas vienam pret otru, bet Zanders nav vienaldzīgs pret meiteni. Bārlova drīz vien sapinas mīlas trīsstūrī. Izrādes mēģinājumi kļūst arvien intensīvāki, slodze aug, un ne Bārlovai, ne Čārlijam neatliek laika nekam citam. Darbs vaiga sviedros, nemitīgā spriedze, sāncenšu nodevība un cīņa bez kompromisiem prasa visus spēkus.

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Vikingu pusaudzis Hikaps dzīvo Berkas salā kopā ar savu valdonīgo tēvu. Kaujas ar pūķiem ir vikingu ikdiena un dzīves veids, taču Hikapu tās neaizrauj. Tā vietā viņš labprātāk nododas visvisādiem izgudrojumiem un apkārtnes iepazīšanai. Reiz kādā no saviem klejojumiem Hikaps sastop ievainotu pūķi, kuram palīdz atkal lidot. Šī sastapšanās maina abu dzīves. Un, kad pienāk iesvētību laiks – lielā iespēja kaujā ar pūķiem sevi pierādīt tēvam un visai ciltij –, Hikaps rīkojas pavisam neparasti.

programme.title: After. Pēc mūsu tikšanās
programme.desc: Tesa pavada pirmo dienu prestižā universitātē. Jaunas sejas, vide, grāmatas, kopmītne, universitātes gaiteņi nupat lielisku mācību gada sākumu, patstāvību un ambiciozu mērķi.Taču dzīve ir pilna dažkārt neparedzamu pavērsienu. Pirmā tikšanās ar istabas biedreni Stefu ierauj Tesu studentu dzīves virpulī ar garām naktīm un Hārdinu. Kopā būšana izvēršas par traku piedzīvojumu, taču šķietami skaistajā stāstā apslēpts drūms noslēpums. Kad tas nāks gaismā, Tesas dzīve vairs nebūs tāda kā agrāk.

programme.title: Triecienmašīna
programme.desc: Jaukto cīņas mākslu un UFC čempiona Marka Kerra stāsts.

programme.title: Brutālists
programme.desc: Bēgdams no pēckara Eiropas, arhitekts Lāslo Tots ierodas Amerikā, lai sāktu jaunu dzīvi, atrastu darbu un gaidītu sievu Eržēbeti, kura cenšas izkļūt no Austrumeiropas. Svešajā un jaunajā valstī Lāslo apmetas Filadelfijā, kur bagātais un ietekmīgais rūpnieks Harisons Lī Van Būrens pamana viņa talantu. Lāslo ir jāatrod savs ceļš jaunajā pasaulē, kurā valda citi noteikumi. Amerikāņu sapnis šķiet iluzors, panākumi un slava maksā lielu cenu…

programme.title: Advokāts
programme.desc: Veiksmīgais advokāts ir sasniedzis savas karjeras augstāko punktu un atradis liktenīgo sievieti, ar kuru vēlas drīz precēties. Viņa mierīgo dzīvi iztraucē senas paziņas lūgums. Piekrītot šim piedāvājumam, advokātam nāksies pieņemt lēmumus, kas neatbilst viņa principiem un morāles normām. Viņš vēl nemaz nenojauš, ka, iesaistoties amorālajā narkobiznesā, viņa dzīve izmainīsies līdz nepazīšanai. Filmā piedalās krāšņs aktieru ansamblis - Maikls Fasbenders, Penelope Krusa, Kemerone Diasa, Havjers Bardems un Breds Pits.

programme.title: Futbols: Serie A. Žurnāls Full Impact. 29. raidījums
programme.desc: All the goals and talking points from the latest action in Serie A.

programme.title: LaLiga. Villarreal - Real Sociedad
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Cīņu sports: One Championship. ONE Friday Fights
programme.desc: ONE Championship is a mixed martial arts (MMA) organization that showcases world-class fighters from across the globe. With a focus on martial arts values and a commitment to integrity, the league promotes adrenaline-pumping, action-packed fights that entertain and inspire fans worldwide. ONE Championship not only showcases the skills of elite fighters, but also highlights the cultural aspects of martial arts, making it a unique and captivating sporting experience.

programme.title: Basketbols: ACB league. Piektā ceturtdaļa.. 22. raidījums
programme.desc: Each episode covers key moments from the games, statistics, strategies, as well as interviews with players and coaches. Its a show for true basketball fans who want to stay up to date with the latest trends and news from the world of sports.

programme.title: Basketbols: Eirolīga. Olympiacos - Baskonia
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Villarreal - Real Sociedad
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.desc: Alison Victoria returns where her design career started to the bright lights and high stakes of Las Vegas! Shes betting on lofty rewards, taking on multi-million-dollar projects and risky flips as she looks to expand her successful design business.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: Windy City Rehab is a reality renovation show hosted by interior designer Alison Victoria. She and her expert team buy and restore old homes in her beloved Chicago historic neighborhoods. It is much more than a simple improvement of a house. Alison and her team are rescuing vintage houses and hold true to the original style and architecture as much as possible. They do their best to pay tribute to the historic roots, while integrating some modern makeovers.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After raising their family in Northern California, a couples ready to relocate to Southern California for waterfront living opportunities.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A couple sells their Idaho property to find an equivalent waterfront home near their two daughters in Show Low, Arizona.

programme.title: Fix My Frankenhouse
programme.desc: Boston-based home renovation experts and husband-wife team Mike and Denese Butler fix what they refer to as "Frankenstein" houses. These are older homes that have become filled with wonky layouts, misplaced staircases and maze-like hallways as different owners make changes over the years. Mike employs his construction know-how to create a functional flow, while Denese will capture the clients style with custom finishes. By blending elements of the older homes charm with modern design, the couple will produce stunning and cohesive spaces. Throughtout the episodes, Mike and Denese will overcome choppy rooms and wasted square footage for clients and work with their dads -- master carpenters John Butler and Peter Doyle -- to deliver one-of-a-kind projects for each family.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Twin sisters Leslie Davis and Lyndsay Lamb have a knack for helping desperate homeowners sell their lifeless homes; the sisters make necessary, impactful renovations that convert unlovable houses into diamonds in the rough.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Twin sisters Leslie Davis and Lyndsay Lamb have a knack for helping desperate homeowners sell their lifeless homes; the sisters make necessary, impactful renovations that convert unlovable houses into diamonds in the rough.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroits iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: With their daughter as their realtor, empty nesters hunt for a home on the sun-soaked beaches of Gulf Shores, Alabama.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs embrace small-town America by renovating classic homes in Bentonville, Arkansas. The resourceful couple preserves and transforms the areas historic houses into charming, updated masterpieces for young, potential buyers looking for a slower-paced lifestyle.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Colorado Mountain House
programme.desc: In Fixer Upper: Colorado Mountain House, Chip and Joanna take on a 1960s mountain property in Colorado, tackling unique design and construction hurdles that come with high-altitude living. Together, they blend original mid-century details with European-inspired finishes, transforming the home into their own timeless family retreat nestled in the Rockies.

programme.title: Flipping 101 with Tarek El Moussa
programme.desc: Facing obstacles at every turn, such as unexpected construction delays and dilapidated interiors, Tarek El Moussa will help these flipping newcomers navigate costly mistakes as they race to get a renovated property on the market.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: Windy City Rehab is a reality renovation show hosted by interior designer Alison Victoria. She and her expert team buy and restore old homes in her beloved Chicago historic neighborhoods. It is much more than a simple improvement of a house. Alison and her team are rescuing vintage houses and hold true to the original style and architecture as much as possible. They do their best to pay tribute to the historic roots, while integrating some modern makeovers.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A young marketing professional is ready to buy her first place in Long Beach, NY. She grew up visiting the island town with her family, and shes getting help from her mom to find a condo with a pool and gym.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A military couple with two large dogs is tired of being crammed into a one bedroom, one bath apartment on Whidbey Island, WA. The newlyweds are looking for a house close to the naval base with a large yard for their pups.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The worlds most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: San Francisco Treats. Rick, Corey and Chum are in San Francisco, California, hoping to find new treasures. Theyll check out some vintage Italian vehicles, pinball machines and a high-price San Francisco Giants collection.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: Emerald City Adventures. Rick, Corey, and Chum are in Seattle, Washington. In between throwing fish at Pikes Market, the guys are hoping to find gems in the Emerald city, with a little help from their experts.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Forged in Fire, an American competition series aired on the History Channel, challenges four new competitors to produce a knife in their own style with a small variety of metal objects to create from. The series, hosted by Wil Willis, consists of a three-round elimination contest to forge bladed weapons, with the final winner receiving $10,000 and the days championship title. Judged by experts in weapon history and use, the last two people standing must create in their own forge a Moro Kris sword, a blade which dates back to 300BC, in just five days. Filmed in Brooklyn, New York, the set referred to as "The Forge" sets the scene for this suspenseful show with propane forges, power hammers and hydraulic presses, with medical personnel being close by to treat any injuries or other health problems. If the medical personnel suspect that the competitors are unable to continue safely, they will be disqualified. Once each competitor has created their weapon, it will be put through a series of tests including chopping/slashing/stabbing objects such as ropes, ice blocks, animal carcasses and steel car doors. Having to meet a number of criterias, the smiths battle it out, without their swords, to become the best black-smith.

With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: The patriotic pals will call on trusted experts to help lay down the law for good deals. Between the events, Chum and Corey get carried away in a massive mansion, and Rick considers a million-dollar memento from a pivotal piece of Americas past.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
